overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding adventure game showing a robed character walking through a grand castle hall with ornate stone architecture. The character passes other students and approaches a large carved wooden door, with natural light filtering through high windows illuminating the gothic interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle hall with statues and students

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall toward the large wooden door, passing groups of students

notable_agents.action: group of robed students conversing near the stone wall

entered.detail: large ornate statue housed within a decorative stone niche with columns
tall carved stone pillar with intricate gothic detailing
large shield emblem mounted on the stone wall between pillars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic hall with high ceilings, passing ornate stone pillars and large statues in alcoves. Groups of robed students stand conversing in the middle distance as natural light filters through high windows, illuminating the marble floor and heraldic shields on the walls.

events.description: moving from the open hall area into the doorway approach zone, statues exit view

agents.ego_description: approaching the large carved wooden door at the end of the hall, moving closer to the entrance

entered.detail: massive wooden door with intricate gothic carvings and black metal hinges
stone steps leading upward to the right of the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive carved wooden door at the hall's end, with the camera moving closer to reveal intricate door details and metal hardware. The stone pillars now loom large on the left, while a staircase becomes visible to the right. The crowd of students has thinned as the character reaches the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic hall that narrows from a spacious public gallery into a focused approach toward a massive entryway. It begins by gliding past ornate stone pillars and towering statues in alcoves, while natural light filters through high windows to illuminate marble floors and heraldic shields. As the camera advances, the wide vista of conversing robed students in the middle distance gradually thins, shifting the focus toward the architecture. The scene then tightens as the character nears the end of the hall, where the stone pillars loom larger on the left and a staircase emerges to the right. Finally, the movement culminates in a close-up approach to a massive carved wooden door, revealing the intricate details of its grain and heavy metal hardware.
